tools.name: oi_status
tools.title: Open Interpreter Status
tools.description: Report whether the Open Interpreter runtime bundle is prepared, the configured model topology, and the telemetry posture.

tools.name: prepare_runtime
tools.title: Prepare Open Interpreter Runtime
tools.description: Idempotently prepare /data/research-runtimes/open-interpreter/<version>/ with the open-interpreter Python package, shim, and manifest. Reuses an existing matching runtime.

tools.name: open_interpreter_run_task
tools.title: Run Open Interpreter Bounded Task
tools.description: Prepare the Open Interpreter runtime when needed, then run one bounded research task by invoking the local bwrap sandbox runner inside this provider container with the runtime bound at /runtime. Returns a natural-language final answer.
